languages.text: "Все, что полагается. Как правильно обслуживать, какие обряды совершать. Мой дед ее корпус строить помогал, отец при освящении присутствовал". {n}Бригадир загибает пальцы, погрузившись в воспоминания.{/n} "Папка мой лично видел, как господин Декабалус благословлял анкер-ядро, питающее вышку".

traits.locale_text: "Все, что полагается. Как правильно обслуживать, какие обряды совершать. Своими руками ее строить помогал, при освящении присутствовал". {n}Бригадир загибает пальцы, погрузившись в воспоминания.{/n} "Лично видел, как господин Декабалус благословлял анкер-ядро вышки".

languages.text: "I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."
languages.original_text: "Все, что полагается. Как правильно обслуживать, какие обряды совершать. Мой дед ее корпус строить помогал, отец при освящении присутствовал". {n}Бригадир загибает пальцы, погрузившись в воспоминания.{/n} "Папка мой лично видел, как господин Декабалус благословлял анкер-ядро, питающее вышку".

My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."

"I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."

"I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. I helped build its housing with my own hands. I was present at the consecration. {n}The foreman clenches his fists, immersed in his memories.{/n} "I personally saw Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the rig."

"I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."

"I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."

languages.text: 「私はこの機械について、知るべきことをすべて知っている。正しい維持の仕方、執り行うべき儀式。祖父はこの筐体の建造を手伝い、父は奉納の儀に立ち会った。」{n}棟梁は自慢のたびに指を一本ずつ折り曲げ、記憶に浸っている。{/n}「父は、この複合体に動力を供給するアンカーコアを、デカバルス師が祝福するのを目にしさえしたのだ。」
languages.original_text: "I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."

traits.locale_text: 「この機械の維持方法、儀式など、全てを知っている。この機械の建造にも、自分の手で貢献した。この機械の奉納式にも、立ち会った。{n}現場監督は拳を握りしめ、記憶に浸っている。{n}「私は、この機械の心臓部を神に捧げる儀式を、デカバルス師匠の目の前で見た。」
「私はこの機械について、知るべきことをすべて知っている。正しい維持の仕方、執り行うべき儀式。祖父はこの筐体の建造を手伝い、父は奉納の儀に立ち会った。」{n}棟梁は自慢のたびに指を一本ずつ折り曲げ、記憶に浸っている。{/n}「父は、この複合体に動力を供給するアンカーコアを、デカバルス師が祝福するのを目にしさえしたのだ。」

languages.text: "Bilinmesi gereken her şeyi biliyorum. Bakımının düzgünce nasıl yapılacağını, hangi ayinlerin gerçekleştirileceğini. Büyükbabam, muhafazasını inşa etmeye kendi elleriyle yardım etti. Babam da kutsama töreninde oradaydı." {n}Ustabaşı, anılarına dalarak her övünüş için bir parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Babam, Üstat Decabalus'un komplekse güç veren çapa çekirdeğini kutsadığını bizzat gördü."
languages.original_text: "I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."

traits.locale_text: "Bilinmesi gereken her şeyi biliyorum. Bakımının düzgünce nasıl yapılacağını, hangi ayinlerin gerçekleştirileceğini. Büyükbabam, muhafazasını inşa etmeye kendi elleriyle yardım etti. Babam da kutsama töreninde oradaydı." {n}Ustabaşı, anılarına dalarak her övünüş için bir parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Babam, Üstat Decabalus'un komplekse güç veren çapa çekirdeğini kutsadığını bizzat gördü."

languages.text: «Sé todo cuanto hay que saber. Conozco las operaciones de mantenimiento adecuadas y los ritos pertinentes. Mi abuelo ayudó a construir los alojamientos y mi padre presenció la ceremonia de consagración». {n}El capataz cuenta sus afirmaciones con los dedos, sumido en sus recuerdos.{/n} «Mi padre incluso llegó a ver a maese Decabalus bendecir el núcleo de anclaje que suministra energía al complejo».
languages.original_text: "I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."

traits.locale_text: «Sé todo cuanto hay que saber. Conozco las operaciones de mantenimiento adecuadas y los ritos pertinentes. Mi abuelo ayudó a construir los alojamientos y mi padre presenció la ceremonia de consagración». {n}El capataz cuenta sus afirmaciones con los dedos, sumido en sus recuerdos.{/n} «Mi padre incluso llegó a ver a maese Decabalus bendecir el núcleo de anclaje que suministra energía al complejo».

languages.text: “该知道的我全知道。如何妥善维护，该执行哪些仪式。我祖父参与建造了它的外壳，我父亲曾亲历其祝圣仪式。”{n}这位工头沉浸在回忆中。每讲一件值得夸耀的事，他就会伸出一根手指。“{/n}父亲甚至亲眼见过德卡巴洛斯大师为供能核心——那颗锚核——降下祝福。”
languages.original_text: "I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."

traits.locale_text: “该知道的我全知道。如何妥善维护，该执行哪些仪式。我祖父参与建造了它的外壳，我父亲曾亲历其祝圣仪式。”{n}这位工头沉浸在回忆中。每讲一件值得夸耀的事，他就会伸出一根手指。“{/n}父亲甚至亲眼见过德卡巴洛斯大师为供能核心——那颗锚核——降下祝福。”

languages.text: « Je sais tout ce qu'il y a à savoir. Comment l'entretenir correctement, quels rites accomplir. Mon grand-père a participé à la fabrication de son châssis et mon père était présent lors de sa consécration. » {n}Plongé dans ses souvenirs, l'homme énumère tous ces succès sur ses doigts.{/n} « Mon père a même vu de ses yeux maître Décabalus bénir le noyau ancestral qui alimente le complexe. »
languages.original_text: "I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."

traits.locale_text: « Je sais tout ce qu'il y a à savoir. Comment l'entretenir correctement, quels rites accomplir. Mon grand-père a participé à la fabrication de son châssis et mon père était présent lors de sa consécration. » {n}Plongé dans ses souvenirs, l'homme énumère tous ces succès sur ses doigts.{/n} « Mon père a même vu de ses yeux maître Décabalus bénir le noyau ancestral qui alimente le complexe. »

languages.text: "Ich weiß alles, was ich wissen muss. Die korrekte Wartung, die erforderlichen Riten. Mein Großvater half beim Bau des Gehäuses und mein Vater wohnte der Weihe bei." {n}Der Vorarbeiter zieht für jede Aussage in seine Erinnerungen versunken einen Finger ein.{/n} "Vater war sogar dabei, als Meister Decabalus den Ankerkern segnete, der den Komplex betreibt."
languages.original_text: "I know all there is to know. How to maintain it properly, what rites to perform. My grandfather helped build its housing, and my father was present at the consecration." {n}The foreman folds a finger for every boast, immersed in his memories.{/n} "Father even witnessed Master Decabalus bless the anchor-core that powers the complex."
